# Reward Evaluation Cache

This folder stores resumable cache files for reward-benchmark evaluation runs.

Typical file names

- `vc_reward_configs_pipelines_vlm_as_a_judge_eval_vc_yaml_results_cache.jsonl`
- `vc_reward_configs_pipelines_ablation_eval_vc_gemini_yaml_results_cache.jsonl`
- `vc_reward_configs_pipelines_ablation_eval_vc_gpt5d1_yaml_results_cache.jsonl`
- `vc_reward_configs_pipelines_ablation_eval_vc_qwen3_yaml_results_cache.jsonl`

These files are derived runtime caches and can be regenerated.
